set.body:
Problem

Eigen.eigSymmetric(DoubleLinearOperator, ...) currently uses single-vector Lanczos. It can resolve at most one vector per distinct eigenvalue, so EigenSelection.Count(k, order) may silently replace missing repeated roots with different roots while SpectralDiagnostics.allConverged remains true.

Characterizing failures:
- diag(5,5,3,2,1), largest algebraic Count(3): required multiset {3,5,5}; current operator result {2,3,5}.
- Four-cycle graph Laplacian, smallest algebraic Count(3): required multiset {0,2,2}; current operator result {0,2,4}.
This forces Scalafim graph-linalg to materialize sparse operators densely.

Scope

Add a multiplicity-safe block symmetric eigensolver for matrix-free operators, such as block Lanczos or LOBPCG, with locking and a restart strategy appropriate to the chosen algorithm. Preserve the existing typed selection, result, failure, residual, and orthogonality surfaces. Shift-invert remains a separate deferred capability and is not part of this issue.

Acceptance

- Count(k, order) returns k eigenvalues counting algebraic multiplicity.
- When converged, repeated eigenspaces are represented with the required dimension; no guarantee is made about the particular orthonormal basis within a repeated eigenspace.
- allConverged is false whenever the requested multiplicity has not been resolved; a different root cannot silently substitute for a missing repeated root.
- Operation remains matrix-free through DoubleLinearOperator and does not require dense materialization.
- Residual diagnostics remain per returned pair and orthogonality diagnostics cover the returned basis.
- Correctness assertions for repeated eigenspaces use projectors, principal angles, or equivalent subspace tests rather than basis-vector identity.
- Shared JVM and Scala.js tests cover repeated diagonal roots, four-cycle Laplacians, disconnected-graph nullspaces, permutation/reindexing and projector invariance, and both spectral ends.
- Existing simple-spectrum behavior and typed non-convergence semantics remain compatible.
set.title: Multiplicity-safe matrix-free symmetric eigenpairs
